'''Iriaz''' were docile creatures from the grassland [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. While not normally aggressive, they could attack if provoked, charging with their horns.<ref name="KOTOR Creatures 2" /> They were a prey of choice for local hunters given that they were a relatively common creature, particularly near the [[Jedi Enclave]].<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>

==Overview==
Iriaz were herbivores found on Dantooine. They lived in massive herds, grazing on grasses, berries, and shoots from the occasional low-slung tree that dotted the open prairies of the planet. They were rarely encountered alone, lone iriaz were usually sick, old, or injured, though the occasional rogue male could also be found.<ref name="KOTOR Creatures 2" />

They were preyed upon by predators such as [[Kath hound/Legends|kath hounds]] and were capable of sprinting at tremendous speed for a short period of time, although this left them winded, so they reserved it only for fleeing or when males tried to thwart predators that got too close to the herd.<ref name="KOTOR Creatures 2" />

Hunters often travelled to Dantooine for the sole purpose of hunting iriaz, which took a toll on their numbers. Iriaz pelts and horns fetched a high price on the market.<ref name="KOTOR Creatures 2" />

==History==
In [[3956 BBY]], the crime lord [[Davik Kang]] of the [[Exchange]] had an iriaz head mounted in his [[Davik Kang's estate|estate's]] trophy room on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

Shortly after the [[destruction of Taris]] at the hands of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] in the [[Jedi Civil War]], a local of Dantooine by the name of [[Rickard Lusoff]] set out onto the plains with his hunting [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] to murder his business partner [[Calder Nettic]]. When he arrived moments too late to find that another man [[Handon Guld]] had killed Nettic first, he fired on Guld in frustration. In the investigation that ensued conducted by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Bolook]] and [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], Lusoff lied that he had been out on the fields hunting iriaz.<ref name="KOTOR" />

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Iriaz.jpg|thumb|left|The cut iriaz model from ''Knights of the Old Republic''.]]

Iriaz were intended to appear in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' but were cut from the game. Dialogue from the "Murdered Settler" quest appears to suggest that they were supposed to be present. One of the two suspects, [[Rickard Lusoff]], claims that he was out hunting iriaz. If the player chooses the dialogue option which has Revan declare that Lusoff is lying because there are no iriaz to be seen, the Jedi [[Bolook]] admonishes him to be more observant, insisting that there are iriaz all around them. This could either have been a mistake in the dialogue that was not corrected or intended as a red herring in the investigation.

Some mods for both the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] and [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] versions allow players to fight iriaz by retrieving their dormant game files.
